title: Create: Korobochke
description: This addon adds new cute helper mobs, expands the use of cardboard, and is truly adorable! "Korobochka" is a player-created mob Korobochka can have a profession, a unique skin, and more!
body:
**This addon adds new cute helper mobs, expands the use of cardboard, and is truly adorable! "Korobochka" is a player-created mob, each unique mob. Korobochka can have a profession, a unique skin, and more!**

### Currently, there are 6 types of Korobochka:

1) The standard type, which has no professions.

2) Storage: (Chest) - This type of Korobochka will follow you, carrying all your resource reserves!

3) Warrior: (Simplified Integrated Circuit) - This Korobochka modification will protect its owner until the last piece of cardboard! (It also attacks hostile mobs.)

4) Exchanger: (Raw Cardboard) - This Korobochka can exchange raw cardboard for a reinforced version, used for crafting decorations!

5) Barista: (Cake) - will give you a random food or drink every few minutes.

6) Junior Engineer: (Signal Receiver Board) - after hearing one of the four "Bell Ringer" commands, Korobochka will act according to the instructions, turning the mechanism on or off!

But that's not all! The mod will diversify your buildings with new cardboard blocks. Cute mobs will move into your buildings, and new gadgets will help your factories become even more vibrant!

### Future features:
- Korobochka skin expansion
- More decorative blocks
- New cardboard items
- A new way to store boxes
